sentences.english: There is a small pond near my grandmother's house.
sentences.korean: 할머니 집 근처에 작은 연못이 있어요.

sentences.english: We went there yesterday to feed the ducks.
We brought old bread from home.
The ducks were very friendly and came right up to us.
sentences.korean: 오리들이 매우 친근하게 바로 우리에게 다가왔어요.

sentences.english: I counted twelve ducks and three baby ducks.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
